case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES VS BELL, MARIO VELEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,515.29 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SF DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, MARIO VELEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, MARIO VELEZ
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-19-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, MARIO VELEZ $2,546.16 PRINCIPAL, $30.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,577.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
